TestCase z28Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_array1 = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_array1, t1.array1, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.array1 = follow_case_array1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation: decrement every fifth element by 3
    for (int i = 4; i < follow_case.n; i += 5) {
        follow_case.array1[i] -= 3;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
